description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with the docker:dind service and defining variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE. Define stages test, build:hugo, release, and deploy. In the test stage add a test config job that runs the before_script "hugo version" on the registry.gitlab.com/osinfs/containerize:base-hugo-0.17 image and executes "hugo --verbose --config config.toml", and a test contentbuild job that also runs "hugo version" then "hugo". In the build:hugo stage add a build to homolog job that runs on all branches except master, executing "docker build -f Dockerfile-hugo -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE ." and "docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE", and a build to release job that runs on tags, first runs "sed -e \"s/#Ganalytics/Ganalytics/\" -i config.toml" then the same docker build and push commands. In the release stage add a release-image job that runs on tags and performs "docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE", "docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE", and "docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE". In the deploy stage add a deploy to homolog job that runs on branches matching /beta\d+/ (excluding master and tags) and sends a curl POST to the homolog service with the built image, and a deploy to production job that runs on tags and sends a similar curl POST to the production service. All non‑test jobs inherit a global before_script that logs in to the GitLab registry and calls two curl finish‑upgrade endpoints for homolog and production.
